programme.desc: Courtney is worried about the sextuplets' speech and enrolls them in various baby classes, which also helps get them out of the house and away from construction mishaps. To thank Eric for all he does, Courtney and the big boys plan an appreciation day.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Web of Destruction
programme.desc: As the sextuplets go from beginning to walk to running wild, Courtney and Eric are having a hard time keeping them contained. The big boys team up with the babies for an Easter egg hunt competition.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: Nothing Short of a Miracle
programme.desc: A tough Texas lawman seeks Lisa's help to tackle a long unsolvable, personal investigation: the story of his own birth and adoption.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: Not My Child to Keep
programme.desc: Chris unwraps the mystery of a woman's origins, which began with her being abandoned at a Korean orphanage. A lover's violent death and the forced adoption of their newborn, has Lisa desperately searching for a woman's only child, hoping it will heal her.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Freezing Theresa
programme.desc: 'Shark Tank' shark Barbara Corcoran gets a reading with Theresa. At a fundraiser, Theresa channels an accident victim for the distraught police officer who couldn't save him. Theresa reads a man while she's inside a cryogenic freezing chamber.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Southern Fried Spirit
programme.desc: Theresa reads 'Real Housewives of New York City's' Dorinda Medley. On a girls trip to Nashville, Theresa surprises a group who doesn't know who she is, and turns them into believers. Larry and Theresa are unsure about their future.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Hooked
programme.desc: A fishing lure embedded in a man's face turns out to be the least of his problems. A pair of unconscious teenagers are brought to the ER where dramatic family secrets are revealed. An ER Tech collapses and then refuses traditional medical treatment.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Frat Boy Blues

programme.title: Gypsy Sisters: The Blame Game
programme.desc: As the family stands firmly divided, Nettie learns an unsettling truth.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: The boys harass Deena for stealing a girl from Vinny's bed, leading her to anxiety and self doubt about her relationship with the roommates. Ronnie and Sam are back to their old ways, but this time Mike is involved in their mess.

programme.title: Floribama Shore: THOTs and Prayers

programme.title: Floribama Shore: From Mad to Grad
programme.desc: Candace is upset about picking bedrooms and lashes out at Nilsa and Aimee. The roommates come together to throw Aimee an anger management graduation party, and one of them is taken away in an ambulance.

programme.desc: After fighting with Codi, Candace invites him to lunch to work out their relationship. Jeremiah invites a girl over for a Sunday Funday, as Gus struggles to maintain his long-distance relationship.

programme.desc: The guys dress to the nines, but act like zeroes while trying to get sympathy, and tonight's big loser faces the music in a tone-deaf punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q enlist shoppers to help them avoid a rogue security guard, and tonight's big loser faces the wrath of a crowd of rockers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe compete in a focus group face-off, convincing people that their TV show ideas are the tops, and tonight's losers might get run out of town when they reveal their financial mismanagement plan to charity donors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Lipstick and the Flying Nun
programme.desc: While working at an antique shop, Michael unpacks an item with a message from beyond. Plus, he works a fundraiser where a painting raises not only money but the body of a nun.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: 3D Galastical Morphin Ranging Power Tents
programme.desc: Find out what trick has Michael using an inhaler, and how the magic team surprises him during a trick. Also, find out the name of his pet tarantula, and his passions beyond magic.

programme.title: The Misery Index: We Got That D!
programme.desc: We learn how many jolts of electricity Q can take and which of the Tenderloins was an 'accident'. Our contestant must get over shameful family antics to compete for the grand prize.

programme.desc: Why Michael says "shenanigans" during some tricks, his favorite trick of all time and why the crew had to shut down production for an hour.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Skull With a Flower Hat
programme.desc: The trick that nearly burned Michaels face, who he gets in prank wars with on-set, and which trick did he created a prop for.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Snow You Didn't! (Part 1)
programme.desc: Kris orchestrates a surprise family vacation to Vail, but their nostalgic getaway hits a bump when the family learns that Rob has proposed to Blac Chyna back in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Snow You Didn't! (Part 2)
programme.desc: The family vacation in Vail continues as everyone tries to process the shocking news of Rob's engagement. Meanwhile Scott tries to prove he can behave himself for the rest of the trip.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Oh Baby!
programme.desc: Fresh off the heels of his engagement announcement, Rob has another piece of news that will change the family forever. Meanwhile, Kylie struggles with anxiety from being in the spotlight.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Iced Out
programme.desc: On a trip to Iceland for Kanye's music video shoot over Kourtney's birthday weekend, Kim finds herself spread too thin as she tries to cater to both her sister and her husband. Meanwhile, Scott debates showing up in Ireland to surprise Kourtney.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Got MILF?
programme.desc: Feeling that Kanye is constantly misunderstood and unfairly vilified, Kim struggles over whether to publicly take a stand for her husband. Kim also prepares for her sexy cameo in Fergie's 'MILF$' music video.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Havana Good Day
programme.desc: The girls jet off for a once in a lifetime trip to the formerly restricted country of Cuba. Meanwhile, Kourtney butts heads with a family member and Kris starts to lose it when she can't reach her girls overseas.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Havana Good Night
programme.desc: As the Kardashian Cuban vacation continues, Kim’s commitment to her work engagements on Mother’s Day stirs up a disagreement. Meanwhile, Scott comes down with a major case of FOMO, and Kim tries to resolve the tension over Kylie’s Puma endorsement.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Digital Rage
programme.desc: The drama between Rob and the family flares up again after Chyna launches an app they find questionable. Meanwhile, Scott is on a mission to prove that Kourtney's allergies are fake.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Andrea Barber from 'Fuller House' stops by to talk about her memoir. Then, we've got New York housewife Luann De Lesseps spilling all the tea in studio.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Keeping Up: Kardashian Family Rules
programme.desc: What makes the Kardashians the Kardashians? Take a closer look at the funny, sexy and outrageous moments when we all fell in love with Reality's First Family.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Hard Candy
programme.desc: Kim and Kourtney plan a joint birthday party for their daughters, but a disagreement over candy puts the special day in jeopardy. Kris is concerned about some of Khloe's obsessive behavior and enlists the help of a professional.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Comforts of Home
programme.desc: Jackie Rothong takes on Matteo Boffo, each hoping to send the other one packing early.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Che-Sing Glory

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Holiday Essentials
programme.desc: The pumpkin spice phenomenon hits the Holiday Baking Championship. For the pre-heat, nine bakers attempt to wow the judges with creative pumpkin spiciness. In the main heat, the bakers must combine a yule log with a classic holiday treat.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Plenty of Gratitude
programme.desc: For the pre-heat, the eight bakers work in teams to make four different kinds of pies. In the main heat, the bakers embrace the stuffed feeling after the Thanksgiving meal by making stuffed cakes featuring seasonal ingredients.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Turkey Day Delights
programme.desc: In the pre-heat, seven bakers must make a dessert combining cranberry with another flavour of the season. The main heat challenges the bakers to create a sweet treat that pairs coffee with an unusual flavour of coffee syrup.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Holiday Artistry
programme.desc: The holidays are a time for artistry and decorations, so for the pre-heat, inflatable holiday decorations inspire the six bakers' cute cream puff displays. In the main heat, the bakers dazzle the judges with delicious hand-painted eggnog cakes.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Light and Inspiring
programme.desc: The Festival of Lights ignites creativity in the pre-heat, when the five bakers have to update traditional rugelach with unexpected new flavors like cardamom, grapefruit, guava paste, peanut butter or chai.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: New Family Classics
programme.desc: The remaining four bakers are going cocoa-loco for the holiday season in the chocolaty pre-heat, when they have to combine common pantry ingredients like balsamic vinegar, potato chips, oatmeal, red wine, olive oil and more.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Gifts Of Greatness
programme.desc: Three bakers remain in the competition, and in the pre-heat, they have to create a beautiful edible holiday ornament display. For the final main heat, the bakers channel holiday gift shopping by creating a cake that is decorated like a gift.

programme.title: Tanked!: The Purr-fect Tank
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett build a 1500 gallon aquarium into the ceiling of a hotel restaurant in Florida. Then, in Seattle they build a tank for internet sensation Henri the Cat.

programme.title: Tanked!: NBA Wizardry
programme.desc: NBA All-Star John Wall asks ATM to build an aquarium shaped like a giant pair of dice. In Georgia they build a huge lighthouse aquarium for a local seafood restaurant that includes engraved dolphins.

programme.desc: Olympic Basketball Champion Paul George orders up two tanks worthy of gold medals and NBA All-Star Dwight Howard returns, this time to have ATM design a slam-dunk habitat for his 14 snakes.

programme.title: Tanked!: Tank of Jericho
programme.desc: When WWE Superstar Chris Jericho wants to get a tank for his family, he calls on aquatic champions Brett and Wayde to make it happen, and asks for a replica championship belt and List of Jericho in the tank.

programme.title: Tanked!: San Francisco Giants Tank
programme.desc: ATM needs to knock this next tank out of the park. The San Francisco Giants want to bring McCovey Cove inside the ballpark. This storied franchise needs a tank big enough to impress all of their loyal fans and have a bit of fun at the same time.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Max Hates My Family
programme.desc: A close-knit family's bond has been broken thanks to Max and his hellish behaviour.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: A Brave Little Dog
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff treats a dog with a mysterious injury. Dr. Petra helps vet tech Jess' Dalmatian after it eats something toxic. A neglected turtle needs a new home, and the team falls in love with a litter of stray kittens.

programme.title: The Zoo: Snow Monkey Social
programme.desc: A new bison calf has a hard time keeping up with his mom. The bird department prepares a group of Von der Decken hornbill chicks for their big move to the Minnesota Zoo. And keepers at the Central Park Zoo hope the female snow monkeys accept a new male.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Never Too Late for Love
programme.desc: Elderly chameleon, Mr. Parsons, has a romantic date with young Daphne from France. It's his last chance to father a child. They first met last year but their rendezvous didn't go well so keepers are hoping for better luck second time around.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Mama Drama

programme.desc: Amanda works with Tia of Pit Bulls and Parolees to rescue a three-legged shepherd mix as part of a road trip rescue mission. She picks up 16 dogs along the way, including a young lab with a brain issue and a puppy mill survivor.

programme.desc: Prior to a beginning a 40-year space journey, Cmdr. Douglas Stansfield falls in love with Sandra Horn. During the journey he's placed in a state of suspended animation, knowing that when he returns Sandra may have aged 40 years.

programme.title: Van Helsing: Been Away
programme.desc: In his hometown, Axel fights both his tragic past and a vicious pack of Daywalkers. Sam can't find Mohamad, and takes his anger out on Chad and Mike.

programme.title: Van Helsing: Christ Pose
programme.desc: Scarlett is reunited with Axel but he is badly injured before they can find Vanessa. A mysterious man helps them find their way. Flesh and Jolene are fugitives on the run from Blaktek.

programme.title: Van Helsing: Birth Ritual
programme.desc: Vanessa and Sam face off to find the Last Elder, with Scarlett, Axel and Mohamad caught in the crossfire. Julius fights the Sisterhood, while Doc unlocks the secrets in the Dark One's blood.

programme.title: Movie: Evil Dead
programme.desc: Five friends head to a remote cabin where an evil presence possesses them until only one is left to fight for survival.

programme.title: Movie: Skyfall
programme.desc: The charming James Bond faces another challenging situation as M deals with her power being threatened. Past events are revealed, as James Bond is possibly the only agent able to help M through this troubling time as action-packed attacks wage on.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
programme.desc: On his 11th birthday, Harry Potter receives a mysterious letter from the Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry, telling him he has been chosen as one of the future students of the renowned school.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab: Skyline Penthouse
programme.desc: Alison and Donovan take on a penthouse with the potential for some serious profit. However, what seems like an easy renovation quickly goes off the rails when an inexperienced superintendent tries to hide his shoddy work.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Junk Yard Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina spot an interesting property in Long Beach, California as they peruse the day's listings. It's a very small house with a massive structure in the backyard.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Custom Craftsman
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are contacted by their friend and fellow flipper, Jessie Rodriguez, who has purchased a craftsman style home in an historic area of Santa Ana, California.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Mid-century Miss
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a midcentury house in La Habra, California, that is towards the top of a hill. The margin is tight on this home so they need to get in and out quickly to maximize profits.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Of Wreck and Ruin
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina spot a home that's for sale by its owner in La Puente, California. It's in rough shape to say the least and because it's tenant occupied, they can't look inside.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Beaming With Potential
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a four-bedroom home in Cypress, California, that the owner is looking to sell quickly. The home is a mess but already has an open floor plan, which will save them money in the long run.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: A Deceiving Deal
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina see a great opportunity to purchase a three-bedroom house in Whittier, California, for a low price since the seller is looking to unload it quickly and it is still tenant-occupied.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Diving Into a Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina buy a large home in Anaheim, California, with some strange additions that could end up costing them thousands of dollars and sacrificing square footage.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Risky Business: Rock Bottom Flip

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Million-Dollar Cookie Cutter
programme.desc: Tarek tackles a cookie-cutter home in Newport Beach, CA, where everything looks exactly the same.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: House of Hidden Horrors
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina head to La Habra, California to check out an enticing off-market listing. The home is typical for the area and appears to need only cosmetic updating.

programme.title: House Hunters: Lest Ye Be Judged

programme.desc: Get a fresh take on a classic episode with new insights from some fan-favorite Troopers.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers: Crawl Space Capture
programme.desc: Troopers brave the dangerously frigid winter night as they hunt for a man who is threatening to end his mother's life, but the search gets complicated when the leads turn cold.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers: Guns, Cash and Coke
programme.desc: Troopers chase a wanted and dangerous man through a forest after he crashes his car into a hotel at 100 miles per hour, injuring three people.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers: Crime on the Kenai
programme.desc: The unforgiving terrain of the Kenai Peninsula makes life tough, as troopers contend with bleak forests, wild waterways and hungry bears.

programme.title: Hard Time: Locked Up: Breaking the Rules

programme.title: Hard Time: Locked Up: Running the Joint

programme.title: Hard Time: Locked Up: The Hustle

programme.title: Hard Time: Locked Up: World Without Men
programme.desc: Welcome to Georgia's largest facility for women, Lee Arrendale State Prison. Here, drugs, hustles and illegal sexual relationships make up much of the world behind bars. We'll meet inmates coping with their prison sentence in unusual ways.

programme.title: Wild Russia: Siberia's Frozen Heart

programme.title: Animals Gone Wild: Out of Control
programme.desc: Amazing footage of wild animals that terrify us or reveal our surprising similarities.

programme.title: Animals Gone Wild: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Witness nature's fiercest life and death struggles.

programme.title: Animals Gone Wild: Animal House
programme.desc: See just how rough and rowdy Mother Nature's most unruly creatures can be.

programme.title: Aloha Vet: Rude Awakening
programme.desc: Island-hop with one of Hawaii’s best-known veterinarians, Dr. Scott Sims, as he treats animals both wild and domestic, large and small.

programme.title: Aloha Vet: Eyes Wide Shut
programme.desc: Dr. Sims stays busy at the clinic and off-island as he tends to a variety of animals, including a horse with a cracked tooth that has to be extracted, an endangered coot, a blind pig and a goat that can’t pee.

programme.title: Aloha Vet: Swimming with Sharks
programme.desc: Dr. Scott Sims, Veterinarian on Kauai, Hawaii, heads to Oahu to get up close and personal with some sharks and then heads home to celebrate his birthday, until the festivities are cut short by a need for Scott to perform emergency surgery.

programme.title: Aloha Vet: Last Resort
programme.desc: Dr. Scott must deliver heartbreaking news to his client Cheyenne, and she must make a life or death decision for her best friend, a golden lab named Roman.

programme.title: Aloha Vet: Hog Wild
programme.desc: There’s a multitude of animals that need attention on the island of Kauai, and Scott has his hands tied trimming beaks, draining growths and stitching up hunting dogs.

programme.title: Aloha Vet: Trouble in Paradise
programme.desc: Scott Sims enjoys being a veterinarian, but he is often faced with multiple animals in life-threatening situations, which can be hard to cope with.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Seventh Wonder
programme.desc: The Lighthouse of Alexandria is one of the world's original Seven Wonders, but it could have been home to a mysterious superweapon, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the secrets of this fabled death ray and its long-lost home.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Buried City
programme.desc: There's a lost city buried in the Sahara, and evidence reveals it's home to Nefertiti, Tutankhamun, and the forbidden god of an outlawed religion. Experts uncover the secret doomsday that caused this strange place to disappear.

programme.title: Unearthed: Vesuvius's Secret Victim
programme.desc: Scientists are using cutting edge technology to unearth a second city that, like the well-known city of Pompeii, was destroyed when Vesuvius erupted in 79 AD. This new town is revealed to be one of the most well-preserved Roman towns on earth.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of the Ice Mummy
programme.desc: The Iceman is the world's oldest and most perfectly preserved mummy, and brand-new cutting-edge forensic technology is revealing his darkest secrets; these discoveries could change everything we know about the humans who lived 5,000 years ago.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Journey to Outcast Island
programme.desc: On a desolate island near Greece, abandoned buildings are evidence of a group of people that were forbidden to leave. Experts reveal who was forced to stay here and if there was a cover-up to conceal what really happened at this strange place.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs
programme.desc: An abandoned system of caves was once the meeting place of a secret society that worshiped Satan and performed black magic. New discoveries at this mysterious site reveal what really happened here and why a Founding Father was a frequent guest.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: World's Biggest Labyrinth
programme.desc: The world's biggest labyrinth is a 1,553-mile cave system that's home to some of history's darkest mysteries, and new discoveries at this strange place reveal the long-lost secrets of Nazi occupation, Soviet revolution, and Cold War subterfuge.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Arctic Hell Pit
programme.desc: Traces of a Russian hole to hell in the Arctic, a military base in America's Wild West, and a strange looming tower are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs
programme.desc: An abandoned system of caves was once the meeting place of a secret society that worshiped Satan and performed black magic. New discoveries at this mysterious site reveal what really happened here and why a Founding Father was a frequent guest.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: World's Biggest Labyrinth
programme.desc: The world's biggest labyrinth is a 1,553-mile cave system that's home to some of history's darkest mysteries, and new discoveries at this strange place reveal the long-lost secrets of Nazi occupation, Soviet revolution, and Cold War subterfuge.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Arctic Hell Pit
programme.desc: Traces of a Russian hole to hell in the Arctic, a military base in America's Wild West, and a strange looming tower are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Journey to Outcast Island
programme.desc: On a desolate island near Greece, abandoned buildings are evidence of a group of people that were forbidden to leave. Experts reveal who was forced to stay here and if there was a cover-up to conceal what really happened at this strange place.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: America's Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: A strange creature like the Loch Ness Monster is recorded in America. Experts analyze evidence of a giant scaly egg, and some wonder if it belongs to a dragon. Birds are suddenly vaporized by an invisible death ray.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Gateway To Hell
programme.desc: A fire-breathing crater burns in the middle of a desert, and some suspect it's a gateway to hell. A deadly shark is found lurking in a golf course water hazard, and experts are baffled how it got there. A giant white blob threatens a town in California.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Beast That Ate Jaws
programme.desc: When a shark is eaten by a mysterious predator, experts wonder if a prehistoric monster is to blame. A sinister sight is caught on tape near Russia's Area 51, and the evidence might point to a cover-up.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Ghost in the Abyss
programme.desc: A deep-ocean expedition discovers unnerving evidence of an alien-like monster stirring in the abyss. When an apocalyptic shockwave is caught on tape, investigators wonder if a meteor has hit a city. Something bizarre is happening in a Siberian ice river.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Skinwalker Awakens
programme.desc: Evidence of a man transforming into an animal is caught on camera on a Native American reservation in Utah, leading some experts ask if it's proof of a Skinwalker, a legendary evil creature that can shapeshift into a deadly beast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien Armageddon Conspiracy
programme.desc: A terrifying tower of fire is caught on camera, causing eyewitnesses to fear an alien invasion. Using cutting-edge science, experts investigate the threat causing this nightmarish phenomenon, and if a cover-up is hiding the truth.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Mystery of the Cannibal Crypt
programme.desc: Mysterious tomb carvings provide dark evidence that ancient Egyptians practiced cannibalism, but we don't know why. New discoveries might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Crocodile Queen
programme.desc: The Crocodile Queen was Egypt's first female pharaoh, but we don't who she was, or why she took this sinister alter-ego. New discoveries might finally answer this ancient mystery, and more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Armageddon on the Nile
programme.desc: Cataclysmic changes in ancient Egypt might have been caused by an extraordinary set of international phenomena, and the latest tech helps identify the supernatural culprit. What experts discover reveals a truth stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Finding Nefertiti
programme.desc: Scientists have spent years looking for the mummy of Nefertiti, one of ancient Egypt's most iconic pharaohs. The latest tech helps experts in their search, what they discover might reveal the shocking truth about how she died, and Egypt’s dark secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Tut's Curse: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal if King Tut's tomb is indeed cursed, as it is said to have killed nine people. The latest science might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to investigate more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Ramses' Forbidden City
programme.desc: Explorers in search of a lost city built by Ramses II uncover startling evidence that reveals the extent of ancient Egypt's scientific knowledge, and the new discoveries at this strange site offer more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Crime 360: Deadly Secrets
programme.desc: In Cleveland, Ohio, lead homicide detective Wally Everett and his partner Mike Smith are called out to a crime scene where a body lays hidden between some hedges and the victim's grandmother's house.

programme.title: Crime 360: At Death's Door
programme.desc: It's a race against time to identify a murder suspect before he disappears for good.

programme.title: City Confidential: Durham: Dangerous Housewife
programme.desc: A philandering and big-spending wife is suspected of killing her husband to get his money.

programme.title: City Confidential: Milwaukee: The Legend of Bambi Bembenek
programme.desc: A curvaceous former Playboy Bunny was charged with the murder of her husband's ex-wife.

programme.title: City Confidential: Boston: Betrayal in Beantown
programme.desc: When the Boston police are fooled into believing a black man killed a pregnant white woman, the city is the scene of strong racism.

programme.desc: The residents of a Texas town are stunned when a well-liked citizen is accused of murder.

programme.desc: Det. Mocello responds to the scene of a suspicious fire in the bedroom of a first-floor apartment. He soon discovers that the deceased victim's charred body has sustained serious trauma.

programme.title: American Justice: Who Killed the Candy Heiress?: The Helen Brach Story
programme.desc: The strange case of candy heiress Helen Brach, who disappeared without a trace in 1977.

programme.title: American Justice: Blood on the Staircase
programme.desc: North Carolina author Michael Peterson was convicted of murdering his wife for her insurance money.

programme.title: Nightwatch Nation: Not Today
programme.desc: Yonkers first responders face unexpected challenges when they respond to a call for a man with a broken ankle who fell from a fire escape. In Tucson, Steven and Sam are called to a structure fire and must search inside for possible victims.

programme.title: Nightwatch: New Beginnings
programme.desc: The team celebrates the opening of its new headquarters, finally complete after 10 years of working out of trailers. The new team, Arcady and Ted, get to know each other's styles in their first shifts together.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Geaux Speed Racers
programme.desc: The deputies are called in to bust teens illegally street racing in the bayou. Deputy Marlin Meeks is dispatched to a disturbance at an old house that is rumoured to be haunted.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: A Real Drag
programme.desc: After a violent boating accident, multiple agencies work to recover a boat, and possibly a body, from the murky depths of the Mississippi waters.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: The Great Swamp Escape
programme.desc: When expensive shrimping nets are stolen, a swamp chase ensues in which the culprit, Deputy Thibodeaux's nephew, manages to escape.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Bayou Beasts
programme.desc: Lt. Peter Guidry is dispatched to a property full of man-made booby traps, including trip wires and bear traps, and a tied-up gator acting as the property's guard dog.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Mardi Gras
programme.desc: Deputies work around the clock in Terrebonne Parish, which is home to the second biggest Mardi Gras in the state.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Bug Off
programme.desc: Deputy Tom Arnold is called down the bayou to investigate a man disturbing his neighbours.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Death Threat
programme.desc: The warden receives an anonymous letter from an inmate threatening to organize a group to attack correctional officers.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Conspiracy
programme.desc: With inmate drug use at an all-time high, the Squad searches for the source of the drugs that have made their way into the prison.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: No Witnesses
programme.desc: When two young ladies don't return home after a run to the local drive-thru, their concerned parents immediately set out on a search to find them. However it will be a fisherman that will give police their first clue that something evil has happened.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Hellfire in the Hollow
programme.desc: When a 21-year-old mother doesn't return from night classes and her car is found burned, investigators immediately suspect foul play. However no one is prepare for the web of lies that ultimately unfold due to her disappearance.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Who Killed Miss Brown Sugar
programme.desc: When 21-year-old Erica Vassell disappears after a Super Bowl party in Clewiston, Florida, the town launches an immediate search. But when her brutally murdered body is discovered days later, everyone in the tiny glades town is left in shock and fear.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Something's Not Right
programme.desc: When a popular cheerleader goes missing in rural Arkansas, the small town is sent into a panic. After her sports car is found abandoned, investigators are sure something is not right, but no one expects the horror that ensues.

programme.title: Shattered: Requiem for Murder
programme.desc: In 1992, when a woman in Harrisburg, Pennsylvania is attacked, police eye a local family man as the suspect. But one detective thinks everyone's got it all wrong: this attack isn't a one-off - it's the work of a serial killer.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: Secrets on the Lake
programme.desc: In 2000, 31-year-old Mike Williams vanished while duck hunting on a Florida lake. His boat and his shotgun were found, but not his body. Seventeen years later, a violent kidnapping led detectives to suspects who had been there all along.

programme.title: Home Sweet Homicide: In the Name of the Father
programme.desc: Jimmy McClain, a beloved basketball coach and teacher, is found brutally murdered in his own home. With no forced entry, police fear Jimmy knew his killer or let the killer inside his house.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Never Let Go
programme.desc: A woman believes she may finally be free of her possessive ex-boyfriend, but months later, now in a new relationship, she can't help but feel she's being watched. The stalker's true identity is not at all what she imagined.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: Secrets on the Lake

programme.title: Home Sweet Homicide: In the Name of the Father

programme.title: Shattered: Requiem for Murder
programme.desc: In 1992, when a woman in Harrisburg, Pennsylvania is attacked, police eye a local family man as the suspect. But one detective thinks everyone's got it all wrong: this attack isn't a one-off - it's the work of a serial killer.

programme.title: Shadow of Doubt: Crossing Bad Creek Bridge
programme.desc: Two young girls are found shot to death on the side of a rural Oklahoma road. The case gets national attention, and no one is sure what would lead anyone to murder two young girls. Then, four years later, police find evidence in an unlikely place.

programme.title: Shadow of Doubt: Mergers and Inquisitions
programme.desc: A wealthy New York financier is found murdered in his East Hampton mansion. With rumblings of torrid affairs and video surveillance that may have recorded the entire event, investigators are led down a winding road three years long.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: If I Can't Have You
programme.desc: A talented graduate student is nursing a broken heart, when she's swept off her feet by someone new. But as their relationship progresses, revelations make it clear nothing is quite what it appears to be.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: Speaking from the Grave
programme.desc: Margaret Purk is just days away from having her first baby when, after an apparent suicide by hanging, she and her unborn son are dead. Twenty-four years later, new clues lead investigators to re-open the case.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: Ghosts of Great Falls
programme.desc: In 1995 three members of a wealthy Taiwanese family living in Virginia disappear. Rumor has it they died overseas but when detectives investigate, they find answers closer to home.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Gypsy Blanchard
programme.desc: A mother is found dead and her disabled daughter missing. As police investigate, they discover many secrets, lies, and betrayals.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Costly Consequences
programme.desc: A botched burglary leaves one teen dead and his friends serving 45 years. Does the punishment fit the crime? A homeowner shoots an intruder. Was it justifiable homicide or a trap? And football players accused of rape, and the women fighting for justice.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Burning Bed
programme.desc: She, a beautiful, ambitious, real estate agent and he, the fun-loving owner of a local lounge. In this story, a tumultuous 2-year romance leads to fiery passion and then murder, a shocking tale of love gone awry.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Blood Red Snow
programme.desc: After a fun night out, Morna Brennen walks into an icy parking lot in Minnesota and disappears. When body parts begin showing up in the area, police must decipher cryptic clues to understand what happened, who did it... and why.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Permanent Frost
programme.desc: On a wintery December evening, a 29 year old supermom doesn't return home after her meeting. Is she going to miss her daughter's first Christmas? Her family is devastated when the devoted mother is found frozen solid and dumped in the snow.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: White Snow, Red Blood
programme.desc: A young man hacks his father to pieces with a machete before taking off on a deadly shooting spree throughout Anchorage, Alaska.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Frozen in Fear
programme.desc: A pedestrian check turns deadly when a cop is gunned down on a midnight patrol. The attacker flees with the officer's squad car...and her weapon. The stakes are higher than ever as investigators try to capture the person who killed one of their own.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Ma Deuce
programme.desc: Nicknamed the 'Ma Deuce', this fifty caliber American machine gun has been rocking the battlefield for over eighty years. Host Wil Willis puts this legendary weapon to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Combat Shotguns
programme.desc: Deadly at close quarters the combat shotgun is a powerful tool of any army. Host Wil Willis fires history's greatest shotguns, from the Blunderbuss to the modern Benelli M4 and Mossburg 590.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Spec Ops Pistols
programme.desc: For today's elite warriors, their last line of defence is the spec ops pistols. Wil tests the Navy Seal Sig Sauer P226, then fires the greatest forerunners like James Bond's Walther PPK, the Soviet Tokarev and the massive Desert Eagle.

programme.title: Weaponology: Green Berets
programme.desc: Green Berets are the lords of unconventional warfare. From bolt-action rifles, to the latest air strike laser technology, Green Berets are the masters of multiple weapons systems. See how they operate under the most extreme conditions throughout history.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rangers
programme.desc: US Army Rangers are the men of steel forged in the fire of every major conflict from the beaches of D-Day to the streets of Baghdad. Weaponology takes you through time to show how the Rangers always ride the cutting edge of military technology.

programme.title: Weaponology: Body Armor
programme.desc: Follow the history of armour protection from medieval knights to the latest revolutionary invention called dragon skin. Find out how a priest invented the first bulletproof vest, and how a pizza boy came up with concealable body armour.

programme.title: Weaponology: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Centuries of technological innovation have resulted in the creation of rifles that can kill a man from 2,000 yards. The history of bullets, guns, sights, mechanisms, camouflage and tactics is revealed.

programme.title: Weaponology: Booby Traps
programme.desc: Dangerous and infinitely adaptable, traps are the hidden killers of the battlefield.

programme.title: American Titans: Hearst vs. Pulitzer
programme.desc: In the late 1890s when William Randolph Hearst challenges the king of newspaper publishing Joseph Pulitzer in a high stakes circulation war, they change publishing forever by stopping at nothing to gain the upper hand.

programme.title: American Titans: Edison vs. Tesla
programme.desc: In the late 1800's a new life-changing electrical industry emerges with the two greatest minds of the day, Thomas Edison and Nikola Tesla, backing opposing positions on how the multi-million dollar industry will transmit power for the next century.

programme.title: American Titans: Rockefeller vs. Scott
programme.desc: John D. Rockefeller, the young new king of kerosene, and Thomas A. Scott, the visionary behind the Pennsylvania Railroad Company, battle for control of America's new oil industry.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Tom Tunney and the Spies of N.Y.
programme.desc: While the First World War rages on in Europe, a German terrorist cell is waging its own secret war on American soil. When a New York City cop uncovers the plot, he must fight to save his country before it's too late.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Allan Pinkerton: Saving Lincoln
programme.desc: Celebrated P.I. Allan Pinkerton is hired to protect a strategic railroad from attack, but as his investigation unfolds, he uncovers a hidden conspiracy to assassinate President Lincoln.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Melvin Purvis: The Gangbuster
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Sheriff Baker and the Everglades Blood Feud
programme.desc: The Everglades are home to bank robbers, rumrunners, and cold-blooded killers. Sheriff Bob Baker is determined to take down one of the most infamous and deadly gangs in Florida's history.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Pablo Escobar: King of Cocaine
programme.desc: Pablo Escobar was the most feared drug dealer in the world. As head of the infamous Medellin cartel he flooded the USA with cocaine and terrorised the South American nation of Colombia. He met his match in a DEA agent who just wouldn't quit.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Merchant of Death
programme.desc: The DEA are running an undercover mission codenamed 'Operation Relentless.' This is a multi-million dollar, international sting with one aim, to take down Russian arms dealer Viktor Bout also known as the Merchant of Death.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Tile Terrors
programme.desc: Turning her attention to Adam and Rachael's bathroom, Nicole deals with the many problems that creep up while working with tile in an old house. When she hits a snag, she must figure out a way to make her fixtures fit in the small space.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Countdown
programme.desc: Nicole must finish a kitchen renovation while newlyweds are on their honeymoon.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Boarded Up Beauty
programme.desc: Nicole is on a mission to save vacant homes from the wrecking ball and her latest project is taking on a boarded up and previously condemned home from the late 80s.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Cabinets Remade
programme.desc: Turning her attention to the kitchen, Nicole must get creative and figure out how to update and reuse cabinets that where in the house.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Bright, Open Living Room
programme.desc: Turning a duplex back into a single-family home isn't always easy, but that's just what Nicole wants to do.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Master Suite Remade
programme.desc: Nicole tries to figure out a way to incorporate the old kitchen pantry into a new master bathroom and has to deal with outdated and out of order parts.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Back Yard on a Budget
programme.desc: Nicole doesn't have much to work with in the back yard, but she's making the best with what she's got. Lifting up the garage to pour a new foundation beats the cost of building a new one from scratch.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Revived Exterior
programme.desc: With work on the 4th Street house nearly complete, Nicole continues to fix up the neglected exterior.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: 25th Street Project
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis works to restore a 1920s bungalow and must tackle a ton of brickwork. Then, she transforms the unfinished attic into a one-of-a-kind master suite and restores the kitchen cabinets to create one of the home's most dazzling features.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: No Bones About It
programme.desc: Police are called to investigate after Michael makes a startling discovery at The City Barn. Then, Mike shows The Toxic Townhouse's owners the structural issues and dangerous gas line.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Can You Dig It?
programme.desc: Mike and the team start on a third project and declare it 'The Toxic Townhouse' after a home inspection uncovers terrible toxic elements and a dangerous pipe issue. Then, the team makes another disturbing discovery at The City Barn.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Bringing the Heat
programme.desc: Mike and the team install a new furnace at The Toxic Townhouse, replacing the decade-old gas fireplace the homeowners were using to heat the home. Then, The City Barn owners are welcomed home with a reveal that takes their breath away.

programme.title: Docked Out: Floating Dock
programme.desc: The crew runs into river rock during the build and must improvise with a floating dock. The new dock features two stories, an upper-level fire pit and an added bonus, it's mobile.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Greek Revival Farmhouse
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs preserve a Greek Rival farm house in Bentleyville, Pennsylvania. Main salvage items include mantles, tiles and a full-sized chicken coop.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging a House in Roanoke, VA, into Repurposed Housing Items
programme.desc: The entire Black Dog Salvage crew pitches in to help save parts of a house in Roanoke, VA. Main items include floors, trim, front porch columns, and a large built in cabinet. Back at the shop, Ted builds a fire pit and fountain from old syrup kettles.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return To Geyser Gulch
programme.desc: The Dawgs return to Geyser Gulch at Silver Dollar City in Branson, MO. Key items this time include a birdhouse, oversized frying pans, and water guns. Back at the warehouse, Mike builds a garden arbor out of two doors.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Rural Retreat Historical Society
programme.desc: Mike, Robert and the team travel to the Rural Retreat Historical Society in Rural Retreat, Virginia. Mike sets up rigging from the rooftop for an outdoor clock while Robert salvages a vault door and bank teller station.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Old Stagecoach Inn
programme.desc: Hosts Mike & Robert salvage a house previously damaged by a tornado near Abingdon, VA. Key items include floors, doors, and a complete staircase. While at the warehouse, Mike makes a commissioned desk for a child from a balance beam.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Trenton Central High School
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs team takes on a huge high school in Trenton, NJ. Key items found include fireclay sinks and oak cabinets. Mike and Tay build an N-shaped desk in the shop.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items in Roanoke, VA, Into Repurposed Goods
programme.desc: At the warehouse, Mike builds a coffee table from a panel door.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Beechcraft Airplane Salvage
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs try something a little different by bidding on a 1947 Beechcraft airplane. Mike goes a little over budget to win the auction and the crew has to hire professionals to figure out how to disassemble it properly.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: St. Andrews Church Spires
programme.desc: The Dawgs help save copper elements from the St. Andrews Catholic Church spires in Roanoke, VA. The guys also bring in an expert to learn more about a large lithograph from a previous salvage.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return To Geyser Gulch
programme.desc: The Dawgs return to Geyser Gulch at Silver Dollar City in Branson, MO. Key items this time include a birdhouse, oversized frying pans, and water guns. Back at the warehouse, Mike builds a garden arbor out of two doors.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Esther Ludwig Mansion
programme.desc: Black Dog Salvage travels to Pennsylvania to save what they can from Esther Ludwig's mansion before it gets demolished. They hope to reclaim some of the mansion's all-original items, such as chandeliers, built-ins and mantles.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Cosby Brothers Mill
programme.desc: Mike and Robert give Tay a history lesson with an old dentistry x-ray machine before the team loads up for a project in Grottoes, VA. They start at Cosby Brothers Mill where they hope to salvage some old mill parts.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Six Weeks For Two A-Frames
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate two A-Frames in Sugarloaf Valley. With only six weeks to accomplish both renovations, Chase splits the team down the middle. A friendly wager allows the winning team to dress the losing team up at dinner.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Dilapidated Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle a 1930s dilapidated island cabin with major rot issues. They have a budget of $30,000 and six weeks to complete the project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Camp on Two Ponds
programme.desc: Chase and his team of Maine builders have been called in to renovate a camp uniquely located on two ponds. With winter right around the corner, Chase knows they need to hustle in order to complete the renovation.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Close Encounters Of The Food Kind
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is hot on the trail of some otherworldly carnival eats at the UFO Festival in Roswell.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Planet of the Funnel Cakes
programme.desc: Noah Cappe drops in on central California's Placer County Fair, the home of some one-of-a-kind fair foods.

programme.title: DuckTales: From the Confidential Casefiles of Agent 22!

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Help Wanted

programme.desc: After receiving intelligence that the ports have been breached, placing the navy and Gulf Coast in harm's way, Pride and the team follow every angle to determine what has entered their city and how they can put a stop to the Broussard Syndicate.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Sic Semper Tyranis
programme.desc: After a military convoy is bombed on a New Orleans bridge, Pride and the team plan a dangerous undercover operation to retrieve a stolen missile and prevent an attack on a U.S. Naval ship.

programme.title: Movie: A Dream of Christmas
programme.desc: A restless young married woman is granted a wish by a Christmas Angel to be single again. She soon realizes that her new life isn't what she bargained for and embarks on a quest to win her husband back.

programme.title: Movie: Switched for Christmas
programme.desc: Identical twin sisters decide to swap lives for the holidays, learning valuable lessons along the way.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Wishes and Mistletoe Kisses
programme.desc: A woman is hired to decorate an estate building a few weeks before Christmas. While there, she works to break down the wall between her and the business owner, all while keeping the holiday spirit alive.

programme.title: Movie: My Christmas Dream

programme.title: Movie: A Gift to Remember
programme.desc: An accident between a sweet bookshop worker and a handsome stranger leaves him without his memory.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Cure

programme.title: Movie: The Mistletoe Promise
programme.desc: Two strangers who share a disdain for Christmas navigate their holiday complications together by creating The Mistletoe Promise. As they spend more time with each other, they discover there may be more to their contract.

programme.title: Movie: A Perfect Christmas
programme.desc: Newlywed couple celebrates their first Christmas by inviting their families to join them. When he gets laid off and she finds out she is pregnant, they try and keep their secrets hidden to have a smooth holiday.

programme.title: Movie: A December Bride
programme.desc: An aspiring interior designer is dreading the wedding of her cousin, who is marrying her ex-fiancé. She accepts an offer to go with a friend, the one responsible for introducing the soon-to-be bride and groom.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Joy
programme.desc: A woman must return to her hometown to care for her aunt during the Christmas break. While there, she meets a man and learns there is no place like home for the holidays.

programme.title: Movie: The Mistletoe Secret
programme.desc: A woman has big hopes for her town's big holiday adventure, until she meets the man behind the plan.

programme.title: That '70s Show

programme.title: South Park: Osama Bin Laden Has Farty Pants

programme.title: South Park: Breast Cancer Show Ever

programme.title: South Park: Lil' Crime Stoppers

programme.title: South Park: Professor Chaos

programme.title: South Park: Simpsons Already Did It

programme.title: The Office: Weight Loss
programme.desc: A Dunder Mifflin weight loss initiative causes the branch to diet and become obsessed with their weight. Michael pursues a friendship with his new HR rep, and Jim misses Pam who is in school in New York.

programme.title: The Office: Weight Loss
programme.desc: A Dunder Mifflin weight loss initiative causes the branch to diet and become obsessed with their weight. Michael pursues a friendship with his new HR rep, and Jim misses Pam who is in school in New York.

programme.title: The Office: Business Ethics
programme.desc: A business ethics seminar gets out of control when Michael lets everyone speak freely about his or her unethical behaviour at work. Meanwhile, Jim makes Dwight comply with the company's 'time theft' policy.

programme.title: The Office: Baby Shower
programme.desc: Michael practices for the birth of Jan's baby by having Dwight go over possible birthing scenarios. Meanwhile, Michael tells Holly that he will pretend to dislike her for Jan's benefit.

programme.title: The Office: Crime Aid
programme.desc: Michael helps Pam get a part time job at corporate so she can afford to go to art school. After the office gets robbed, Michael decides to hold an auction to raise money for all the items lost.

programme.title: The Office: Employee Transfer
programme.desc: Pam is embarrassed when she is the only person at the corporate office wearing a costume on Halloween. Holly and Michael take the long trip to Nashua after they get some shocking news. Meanwhile, Dwight torments Andy and tries to get under his skin.

programme.title: The Office: Customer Survey
programme.desc: Dwight and Jim are shocked when they get the results of the annual customer survey report. Pam and Jim decide they want to spend every minute together using their Bluetooth phones. Meanwhile Angela and Andy pick a location for their wedding.

programme.title: The Office: Business Trip
programme.desc: Michael is ecstatic when David Wallace decides to send him on a business trip to Canada. Andy and Oscar become unlikely friends when Michael decides to bring them along. Meanwhile Jim counts down the days until Pam gets back from art school.

programme.title: The Office: Frame Toby
programme.desc: A mysterious person in the office has made a huge mess in the microwave and will not clean it up. Meanwhile, Michael has to come to terms with the fact that there have been certain personnel changes in his staff without his knowing.

programme.title: Movie: A Very Merry Toy Store
programme.desc: Two competing toy store owners face adversity when a big-box toy store opens in town. Now, they must overcome their differences to try to save their individual stores in time for the Christmas shoppers.

programme.title: Movie: Last Chance for Christmas
programme.desc: When Prancer injures his hoof, Santa's stable hand must find a fill in to save Christmas. His mission gets complicated when he discovers that Frankie, the perfect substitute reindeer, belongs to an 8-year-old girl and her mother Annie.

programme.title: Movie: The Magical Christmas Shoes
programme.desc: A pair of magical shoes appear during a young woman's holiday season and help her discover her Christmas spirit.

programme.title: Movie: Dear Santa
programme.desc: A young woman discovers a letter from a little girl asking Santa to send her daddy a new wife for Christmas. The young woman decides to seek them out, hoping to make herself their gift from Santa.

programme.title: Movie: Four Christmases and a Wedding
programme.desc: An event planner who has given up on love, but one day, she meets the perfect man. After learning that Mr. Perfect is being transferred overseas for work, she asks Santa to work his magic and bring them together.

programme.title: Movie: Wish Upon a Christmas
programme.desc: A business executive returns home to help a family-run ornament company. She finds herself rekindling an old romance with her high school boyfriend who is also the owner of the company.

programme.title: Movie: Random Acts of Christmas
programme.desc: Investigating random acts of Christmas around her city, a young journalist meets a competing reporter who sparks her Christmas spirit.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: In Cold Blood
programme.desc: Sandee Rozzo is preparing to face her attacker at court when she’s gunned down in her garage. The culprit seems obvious, but as detectives dig deeper, they learn nothing about this case is cut and dry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bed of Deceit
programme.desc: When a retired police officer is found shot dead in his bed, investigators suspect suicide. But the evidence, alongside surveillance tape from a nearby bank, seems to indicate it was murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Letter Perfect
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep. There are no signs of trauma or injury, but toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Promises
programme.desc: A tape recorded by a popular gym teacher before his own death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Time Will Tell
programme.desc: A Canadian financier assumes the name of a co-worker as part of a money-laundering scheme. The man turns up dead in the ocean, with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nursery Crimes
programme.desc: Medical investigators have no answers as to why children at a Texas hospital are dying at a higher rate than at any other hospital until they discover that one nurse seems to be on-duty in almost all the fatal cases.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lasting Impressions
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: The Dead Wives Club: The Bookie's Wife
programme.desc: Doris Angleton, a Houston socialite, is found shot to death on her kitchen floor, while her husband Bob was coaching their twin daughters’ softball game.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treading Not So Lightly
programme.desc: When a four-year-old girl is found unconscious in a parking lot, police concluded it was a hit and run vehicle accident, and left it at that. But the girl's mother was determined to find out exactly what had happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer
programme.desc: Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her two top lieutenants disappeared with no shortage of suspects. Her abduction may never have been solved if it weren't for the discovery of a headless, handless body, and the serial number on an artificial hip.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gold Rush
programme.desc: A man calls 911 saying his girlfriend shot herself, but the autopsy reveals that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Signed, Sealed, and Delivered
programme.desc: When a bomb explodes in a home, police believe it was an act of revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: News at 11
programme.desc: Authorities believe that the death of a news anchor is the result of a tragically overzealous fan, but when a police dog tracks the killer back to the crime scene, officers are forced to include the crowd of onlookers in their list of suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Investigators initially believed a house fire that killed a woman was unintentionally caused by a cigarette, but a closer look by scientists uncovers more to the story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tourist Trap
programme.desc: Bite marks lead the police to a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet
programme.desc: When one woman's drowning death in Pennsylvania triggers another investigation into a woman's eerily similar death in North Carolina, medical examiners must determine if the women drowned or were in fact murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold
programme.desc: When a Massachusetts man dropped dead of an apparent heart attack, no one thought foul play was a possibility until police looked into his girlfriend’s odd behavior in the days before his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Music Case
programme.desc: The sense of security in Waseca, Minnesota shatters when 12-year-old Cally Jo Larson is found dead in her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Private Thoughts
programme.desc: An entire family found dead inside their burned-out home appears to be a murder-suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All the World's a Stage
programme.desc: Police must investigate one of their own when a detective says his wife shot herself in the head. While he claims he called 911 as soon as he could, evidence makes police doubt the detective's story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bed of Deceit
programme.desc: When a retired police officer is found shot dead in his bed, investigators suspect suicide. But the evidence, alongside surveillance tape from a nearby bank, seems to indicate it was murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Letter Perfect
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep. There are no signs of trauma or injury, but toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road
programme.desc: After a married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a vacation in Key West, the wife went missing and police searched the island without finding any evidence. Then two important pieces of video surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course
programme.desc: A highway patrolman is shocked by a coroner's ruling of an 'accidental death.' after he attends a Crash scene with far more blood than usual. An anonymous tip reinvigorates the investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soiled Plan
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search after a mother of two young children went missing. Days later they found her body. Then the case went cold for twenty years, until advances in technology allowed the investigators to see the case in a new light.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Two Teams, One Dream
programme.desc: Fred and Dustin Hurt decide to split up in their hunt for gold in the raging waters of Alaska's Chilkat mountains. While Fred has an ideal spot picked out, Dustin has a big decision to make about his location.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: The Pound Zone
programme.desc: Dustin's crew finds an ideal claim to mine, but to get down to the gold they have to make it through the waterfall's pound zone. Fred brings in a new miner, only to have his path to bedrock gold is blocked by massive boulders.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Leave No Gold Behind
programme.desc: Parker questions the ground he's mining and his new foremen. Tony makes a big decision to move the family's entire operation. Rick's mechanic arrives at a critical moment. Then, the Dakota Boys work together in the hunt for gold in Alaska's raging waters.

programme.title: Gold Rush: We're Gonna Need A Bigger Bucket
programme.desc: Parker commands a huge engineering challenge to his team. Rick makes a huge upgrade to his operation. Mike and Monica team-up. At the start of the season, the Dakota Boys split up in their hunt for gold in the raging white waters of the Chilkat mountains.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Pay Dirt: Monster Red Lives
programme.desc: With insider facts and bonus scenes: Rick hopes a monster washplant will help him find big nuggets. Tony Beets' latest claim has flooding problems. And Big Red needs to relocate in record time so Parker can get back in the gold hunt.

programme.title: Gold Rush: No Guts, No Glory Holes
programme.desc: The Beets discover what could be the motherlode. Rick faces an impossible decision: mine gold or put together his new washplant. Parker tests his new co-foreman. Fred returns to the Glory Hole while Dustin takes a radical approach to get down to gold.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters: The Sky Is Falling
programme.desc: Rookies Justin and Daniel tread a dangerous path underground in Coober Pedy, while father and daughter mining team, Kelly and Al race to stake a claim in Lightning Ridge in an attempt to turn their fortunes around in a search for the valuable black opal.

programme.title: Gold Rush: No Guts, No Glory Holes
programme.desc: The Beets discover what could be the motherlode. Rick faces an impossible decision: mine gold or put together his new washplant. Parker tests his new co-foreman. Fred returns to the Glory Hole while Dustin takes a radical approach to get down to gold.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters: The Sky Is Falling
programme.desc: Rookies Justin and Daniel tread a dangerous path underground in Coober Pedy, while father and daughter mining team, Kelly and Al race to stake a claim in Lightning Ridge in an attempt to turn their fortunes around in a search for the valuable black opal.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker Comes of Age
programme.desc: Featuring never-before-seen footage captured over six years, this special celebrates Parker's coming of age from a 15-year-old boy who learns from his beloved grandpa to the 21-year old man who becomes a major player in the Klondike.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Greener Pastures
programme.desc: With predators stalking the homestead, the need for safe grazing land for cattle is greater than ever. Atz Sr and Atz Lee head to Perl Island to begin plans for new pasture, while Otto and Eivin set to work transporting a small herd to the island by boat.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Otto's Surprise
programme.desc: When Jane and Charlotte get word of a sick calf at the Head of the Bay, they trek through bear country to protect their herd. Three generations of Kilchers build a line shack on Perl Island, and Otto has a surprise for Charlotte.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier Exposed: Moving Mountains
programme.desc: Things get explosive when the Kilchers expand a road on their homestead with detonation expert Desmond Duffy. Later, Jane and Charlotte get stuck in the mud on a fishing trip while Atz Sr. and Bonnie brave the backcountry to salvage vital resources.

programme.title: Major League Fishing's Pro Bass Tour: Bass Pro Tour: 2019 Stage Eight Neenah
programme.desc: The Championship Round of Major League Fishing's Bass Pro Tour Stage Eight Neenah.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Lost Skyscrapers
programme.desc: A ground-breaking experiment reveals how ancient Egyptians built the giant obelisks of Thebes, and new discoveries at this holy site could explain why these mysterious marvels triggered the downfall of the pharaohs and the end of Egypt's golden age.

programme.title: Unearthed: Forbidden City of the Pharaohs
programme.desc: A mysterious city in ancient Egypt is the home of the Valley of the Kings and grand temples, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and if the god the pharaohs worshiped here helped them rise to power.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of the Cursed Pyramid
programme.desc: Egypt's strange bent pyramid is one of the world's most mysterious ancient mega-structures, and new discoveries help experts investigate its dark secret: if it was always intended to look so bizarre, or if something went catastrophically wrong.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost World of Easter Island
programme.desc: The mysterious statues of Easter Island were built by one of the world's strangest and most isolated civilizations, and today, new evidence reveals why they were built and what caused Easter Island's sudden downfall.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Buried City
programme.desc: There's a lost city buried in the Sahara, and evidence reveals it's home to Nefertiti, Tutankhamun, and the forbidden god of an outlawed religion. Experts uncover the secret doomsday that caused this strange place to disappear.

programme.title: Unearthed: Vesuvius's Secret Victim
programme.desc: Scientists are using cutting edge technology to unearth a second city that, like the well-known city of Pompeii, was destroyed when Vesuvius erupted in 79 AD. This new town is revealed to be one of the most well-preserved Roman towns on earth.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of Troy
programme.desc: The legendary lost city at the center of the Trojan War is Troy, but its existence has never been confirmed. Now, discoveries and cutting-edge science might prove if this place existed, and if the Greeks really conquered it with the infamous Trojan Horse.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Ready, Aim, Focus!
programme.desc: Bride Ashley is a former pageant contestant and part-time model; Christie is a former Hollywood stuntwoman ready to get married.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: New Beginnings
programme.desc: Katie, who survived a double lung transplant, is looking for the perfect dress to celebrate her new beginning. Molly is a debutante looking for a dress to signal her transition into womanhood.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Staying True Before Saying 'I Do'
programme.desc: Indian bride Rashi wants an Americanized gown for her wedding reception.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Not Afraid to Try New Things
programme.desc: Wedding planner Rachel is excited to try on dresses so edgy they might scare off other brides. Plus, Natalie also wants a unique gown, but she's worried about getting her traditional mom's approval.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Rainbow Unicorn Dress
programme.desc: Sharde dreams of a colourful dress to suit her rainbow unicorn wedding, but her mother does not approve. Bride Spencer wants a very avant-garde and dramatic gown for her big day. Sarah is shocked when the scissors come out during her fitting appointment.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Come on in, Grandma!
programme.desc: Amanda's biggest challenge is finding a dress both she and her opinionated grandmother love. Hillary searches for a specific gown her late grandmother adored. Macie already found her dream dress, but now Grandma wants to see her in something different.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Star Studded Spirit
programme.desc: On this season premiere, Theresa gives readings to some of your favorite celebrities. Comedian Rosie O'Donnell, Oscar-winning actress and comic Mo'Nique, 'Mike & Molly' star Billy Gardell, and Porsha from the hit show 'Empire,' Ta'Rhonda Jones.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Beyond the Read: Keeping the Faith
programme.desc: Theresa conducts a group reading for people of different faiths to show how everyone is connected by Spirit. A pastor, a rabbi, a practicing Buddhist and members of the Hindu faith receive meaningful readings.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Clearing the List
programme.desc: Reaching out to fans who've been on her mailing list for a decade, Theresa does a series of big group readings to clear her list. A man grieves as he wasn't able to save his dad, and two moms are reconnected to their children who took their own lives.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: An Adult Orphan
programme.desc: Lisa hopes that locating a man's biological mother will finally allow him to overcome his lifelong struggle with abandonment. Chris is tasked with locating a woman's only child and delivering the difficult details of her daughter's birth story.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: Secrets Are Better Kept Than Said
programme.desc: Lisa helps a woman locate her son hoping to end the sorrow she's felt since placing him for adoption decades ago. Chris searches for the father a woman knows nothing about, since her mother died during childbirth.

programme.title: Mama Medium: Haunting at the Lake
programme.desc: The family goes to their lake house for a vacation, but Jennie still has to work. Jennie offers healing to a skeptic who's mourning the loss of his mother.

programme.desc: Mirian's ceremony is a heartfelt affair with her father officiating while Colleen's alcohol-free reception follows the couple's first ever kiss.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Rainbow
programme.desc: Zumba instructor Nicole leads her guests in a hip-shaking routine, while singer Soulfia croons for her groom at her rainbow reception.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Fire Ant Attack

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Pickup Truck
programme.desc: Rikki Dea is a no-fuss bride serving up barbeque from a local restaurant for dinner, while Amy has planned a fancy dinner with sparkling decorations.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a School Bus
programme.desc: Lindsey says her vows surrounded by nature, while Erika takes the elevator to her chic penthouse nuptials.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Smoking Cocktail
programme.desc: Kateryna walks barefoot through the sand to make her vows while Kira's in diamonds in an elegant ballroom.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: A Love Worth Fighting For

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patnocchio/ ChefBob
programme.desc: Plankton tells Patrick he's his conscience so he can convince him to steal him a Krabby Patty. SpongeBob gets stage fright and has to invent a new persona.

programme.desc: Plankton's giant Chum Bucket glove runs wild, but SpongeBob has a friend to help them out. The reformed 'Clean Bubble' works at the Krusty Krab.
